# SquareOne
> Neo-brutalist expense tracking app built with React and Supabase.

## Core Files
- `App.tsx`: Main application entry point and routing (HashRouter).
- `context/AppContext.tsx`: Primary state management for friends, transactions, and custom types. Routes all reads/writes to Supabase (authenticated) or localStorage (guest).
- `context/AuthContext.tsx`: Authentication state management using Supabase Auth (email, Google, Apple).
- `utils/supabase.ts`: Supabase client initialization.
- `utils/guestStorage.ts`: localStorage CRUD for guest sessions (key: `squareone_guest_data`). Cleared when a real session attaches.
- `utils/calculations.ts`: Client-side friend balance and net balance calculations.
- `utils/formatters.ts`: Currency and date formatting helpers.
- `components/NeoComponents.tsx`: Core UI design system (neo-brutalist / Neo style).

## Key Concepts
- **Neo-brutalism (Neo)**: The visual style — bold black borders, high contrast, modern aesthetic.
- **Real-time Sync**: Authenticated data kept in sync via Supabase PostgreSQL changes listener.
- **Friend Balances**: Calculated on the client from raw transaction history (`utils/calculations.ts`).
- **Guest Mode**: A fully functional offline mode for users without an account. All friends and transactions are stored in `localStorage` under `squareone_guest_data`. No Supabase calls are made for `user.id === 'guest'`. Guest data is cleared when a real account session starts.
- **HashRouter**: All routes use `/#/` prefix. Supabase Auth redirect URLs must include the hash (e.g. `window.location.origin + '/#/dashboard'`).

## Tech Stack
- React 19 (Vite)
- TypeScript
- Supabase (Auth, DB, Real-time)
- React Router 7 (HashRouter)
- Framer Motion (animations, spring physics, reduced-motion support)
- Tailwind CSS (CDN — no build step)
- Lucide React (icons)
- Recharts (data visualization)
- react-number-format (amount input formatting)
- canvas-confetti (settlement success celebration)

## Docs
- `docs/architecture.md`: System architecture, routing, state management, guest path, animation layer.
- `docs/database.md`: Full schema, RLS policies, real-time setup.
